target_surface: additional authenticated REST/HTTP Secret Manager variants
planned_execution_path: Secret Manager placeholder resolution through gcloud secrets versions access

blocker.message: gcloud cannot refresh the active account token in non-interactive execution.
blocker.error_prefix: There was a problem refreshing your current auth tokens: Reauthentication failed. cannot prompt during non-interactive execution.

validated_before_block: Public echo endpoint reached for bearer and API-key header echo.
Core REST and HTTP readers already support bearer_token, api_key and basic auth after adapter-side secret resolution.
Local GCP smoke tests cover placeholder resolution before the shared core REST/HTTP reader is called.
required_to_unblock: Run gcloud auth login or otherwise refresh Application Default/gcloud credentials interactively for the active account.
Create temporary Secret Manager secrets for the planned auth variants.
Run the contract-only GCP smoke commands and delete the temporary secrets after evidence capture.
